headlines.title: U.S. auto industry faces more uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
headlines.summary: A major issue for automakers is the deal's rules of origin, which determine where a product comes from and which goods are eligible for preferential treatment.

headlines.title: Trump Accounts for kids launch July 4: What parents need to know
headlines.summary: Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies for free money and when the funds can be withdrawn.

headlines.title: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028
headlines.summary: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028, the company announced Wednesday morning.

headlines.title: Private payrolls rose by 98,000 in June, less than expected, ADP reports
headlines.summary: Companies added slightly fewer workers than forecast, with hiring targeted heavily toward healthcare-related sectors.

headlines.title: Tech leads first half stock gains — but the biggest winners weren't in the U.S.
headlines.summary: U.S. Big Tech stocks enjoyed strong gains — despite a sharp sell-off at the end of June — but were largely outperformed by their international counterparts.

headlines.title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
headlines.summary: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.

headlines.title: Bulls are betting big on this global ETF that's deep in a bear market
headlines.summary: U.S. stocks just keep winning, with the Nasdaq closing out its best quarter since 2020. Across the globe in China, things couldn't be more different.

headlines.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
headlines.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

headlines.title: Micron's monster post-earnings rally is almost gone. Traders divided on where it goes next
headlines.summary: The maker of memory chips slid to start the week, marking an about-face from its post-earnings surge.

headlines.title: This insurance stock is on an impressive run. How to ride the momentum with less risk
headlines.summary: MetLife (MET) is well-positioned in the life insurance and benefits sector, exhibiting fundamental momentum that the broader market hasn't fully priced in.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for strong long-term growth potential
headlines.summary: Amid volatility in global markets, top analysts can help investors look past near-term noise and pick attractive stocks with long-term potential.

headlines.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
headlines.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

headlines.title: My student loans are paused until 2028. Should I pay them now anyway?
headlines.summary: Plus: What’s going on with ‘grade inflation’?

headlines.title: Almost 100% of the Nasdaq-100’s gains in the first half of 2026 came from just 10 stocks
headlines.summary: Micron led the way, contributing 26% of the Nasdaq-100’s first-half returns and 17% of the S&P 500’s gains, according to Jefferies.

headlines.title: Record beef imports are flooding the U.S. — so why is your Fourth of July BBQ so expensive?
headlines.summary: Beef prices are sizzling and Washington’s recipe for high costs — import more meat — only grills your wallet.

headlines.title: Businesses added 98,000 jobs in June, ADP says. Labor market is on the mend, but it’s still not great.
headlines.summary: ADP said U.S. businesses 98,000 new jobs in June — the smallest increase in three months. The  payroll processor said hiring was slow but demand for labor was improving.

headlines.title: Warsh warns investors not to expect hints at future Fed rate moves
headlines.summary: New Federal Reserve chief Kevin Warsh gave no hint of whether the central bank would raise interest rates in July and repeated his dislike of so-called forward guidance to alert investors to future Fed actions.

headlines.title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Do I call her out?
headlines.summary: “She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400.”

Underexposure to preferred themes such as AI / compute infrastructure, small modular reactors / clean energy, and cybersecurity.
Cash buffer is above the minimum requirement, but could be better utilized for potential long-term investments.

Consider reallocating funds from trimmed positions into preferred themes to diversify portfolio.

Is there a target allocation for cash deployment in the near term?

candidates.thesis: Leading semiconductor company with strong exposure to AI and compute infrastructure. Benefiting from secular growth trends in high-performance computing and data centers.
World's largest semiconductor foundry with critical role in global chip manufacturing. Positioned to benefit from increasing demand for advanced nodes in AI and compute applications.
Cloudflare is a leader in cybersecurity and edge computing, benefiting from secular growth in internet infrastructure and security services.
Marvell Technology is well-positioned in AI, 5G, and cloud infrastructure, with strong growth potential in data centers and networking solutions.

ASML is the dominant supplier of lithography equipment for semiconductor manufacturing, including EUV technology critical for advanced chip production. Strong tailwinds from AI and compute infrastructure demand.
